_meta.purpose: Pre-reset preservation of the polluted wave-1 active census state. Full snapshot of every non-null ownership_tier row in practice_locations and the underlying / orphan practices rows, captured BEFORE the reset NULLs these columns. Wave-1 is candidate-quality only (per QA: duplicate-door contradictions, branded_dso/PE-rule over-reach, 41/85 AO rows needs_more_evidence). This file lets the reset be fully reversible.
